title: Science With Brain Cafe - Learn About Chemicals
desc: Shakti explains about chemicals and its various reactions. Brain Cafe, a perfect hangout where children learn all about science concepts and theories.

desc: Learn about Human body

title: Karadi Tales - Young Hanuman
desc: Young Hanuman chases a red fiery ball but it turns out to be the sun!

title: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time
desc: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Tenali Raman - Tenali Raman and The Thieves
desc: Two expert robbers recruited by Rajguru plan to rob Tenali Raman's house. Tenali Raman outwits them in a hilarious climax.

title: Tenali Raman - Golden Mangoes
desc: Queen mother of Vijayanagara dies with an unfulfilled wish of eating mangoes. The Rajguru use this opportunity to make some hot cash. The rest of the story tells how our hero Tenali Raman spoils the party.

title: Tenali Raman - Tenali Raman and The Mahabharata
desc: The kingdom of Vijayanagara faces the threat of an attack from the Northern Emperor. Raman is sent as an emissary and the Northern Emperor gives him an uphill task of writing the Mahabharata by making him the hero. How Raman outwits the vile Northern Emperor forms the crux of the story.

title: Jungle Safari - Competition
desc: In the jungle, it's like everywhere else in the world: Things aren't always harmonious and peaceful.

title: Jungle Safari - Playing
desc: In the Jungle, a rubber ball is used for fun and games.

desc: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Mister Maker - Junk Picture
desc: Mister Maker makes a fantastic 'junk' picture, shows how to paint with cardboard and creates realistic beans on toast that look really tasty! Guess the answer to today's shape puzzle, and watch 'The Mister Maker Kids' make a gigantic rocket picture that's out of this world

title: Mister Maker - Stone Footprint
desc: Mister Maker makes a 'stone footprint', paints a fun firework picture that looks good enough to frame and squeezes a ship into a jar sailing on ship of blue rice. Guess the answer to today's shape puzzle, and watch 'The Mister Maker Kids' make a gigantic snail!

title: Darwin - Sailing Away
desc: Wapiti gets blown away so Darwin and Newt's use the power of wind to rescue their friend. Will they be able to succeed?

title: Darwin - Snail chase
desc: In this series, Darwin and Newts use the zipline to take Heni to see an incredible giant snail, a malfunction is overcome thanks to their newfound knowledge of magnets.
